subcodes.first_line: O ancient friends and companions! Though companionship is not confined to gathering in a single spot and clime, but rather dependeth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان قدیم ندیم هر چند ندیمی مشروط باجتماع در یک بقعه و اقلیم بلکه منوط
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart
